content:
Leadership Begins with Service

Leadership is not about a position, it is about accepting responsibility, creating opportunities for others and leaving every team stronger than you found it.

Congratulations to the newly elected student leaders of the DREAMS Chapter, St. Francis de Sales College (Autonomous), Electronics City, Bangalore.

Your election reflects the trust your peers have placed in your character, commitment and ability to lead with purpose. As you begin this new chapter, remember that the finest leaders are those who influence through humility, empower others to grow and remain committed to serving a cause greater than themselves.

I wish each of you a tenure filled with learning, collaboration and meaningful achievements. May your leadership inspire others and create a lasting impact on your campus and beyond.

Congratulations once again, and my best wishes for the journey ahead.

comment: Student leaders often discover that the real test begins after elections—balancing representation, accountability and the ability to bring quieter voices into decisions.
